name: Carryall Transportation Svc
districts_or_customers: church conventions and conferences (NC, SC, VA)
fit_notes: Not a school-bus/special-needs operator. Company is a concierge luggage delivery service for church conventions/conferences across NC/SC/VA. Not a tuck-in target for Summit.

name: Premier Express Transport LLC
fit_notes: Could not confirm operations. Website (clevelandexpresstransport.com) returned ECONNREFUSED, suggesting site is down/dormant. No web footprint as a school-bus or special-needs operator in Cleveland. Likely too small/inactive to be a viable tuck-in; verify status via OH SOS before pursuing.

name: Virgo Medical Svc Inc
recent_news: DOL Wage & Hour Division settlement announced April 2022 (whd20220415); company also subject of GAO bid protest decision B-420462 involving federal contracting.
fit_notes: Independent minority-owned special-needs/NEMT operator (since 1998) with a school-transport line for wheelchair-bound students in NJ; small scale (~8 employees). DOL wage settlement is a yellow flag. Possible micro tuck-in for NJ special-needs density only; size limits standalone strategic value.

name: All Town Transport Inc
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus/student-transport operator. Pure 24/7 NEMT business since 2003 serving medical patients in LA area. Not a tuck-in target for Summit.

name: Around Clock Limousine
fit_notes: Operates as Delta Transportation Worldwide / Around the Clock Limousine — luxury limo and airport transfer in Palo Alto/Bay Area. No school-bus, special-needs, or student-transport service identified. Not a tuck-in target for Summit.
